deploy.startCommand: echo '=== STARTING API ===' && echo '--- PWD ---' && pwd && echo '--- ls -la ---' && ls -la && echo '--- ls -la dist/ ---' && (ls -la dist/ 2>&1 || echo 'NO dist/ DIRECTORY') && echo '--- ls -la node_modules/.prisma ---' && (ls -la node_modules/.prisma 2>&1 || echo 'NO .prisma') && echo '--- NODE VERSION ---' && node --version && echo '--- NODE ENV CHECK ---' && node -e "console.log('node can execute; cwd=' + process.cwd())" && echo '--- DIRECT FILE CHECK ---' && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); console.log('dist/index.js exists:', fs.existsSync('dist/index.js'), 'size:', fs.existsSync('dist/index.js') ? fs.statSync('dist/index.js').size : 0)" && echo '=== EXECUTING INDEX.JS ===' && node dist/index.js 2>&1
